summary: Vaginal intraepithelial neoplasia does not evolve like cervical intraepithelial neoplasiacan be inferred from lack of shared evolutionary trajectories described in available literature; their clinical behaviors and progression paths are distinct due to different underlying biology and monitoring approaches. The absence of documented parallel progression supports that these conditions follow divergent rather than identical courses over time.
